body:
Weekly shoot schedule

Bookings and prep notes for Larry Rawlings Photography, week of 2026-03-21.

  • Pinnacle Events gala - confirm shot list
  • Rosewood Realty listing reshoot
  • Engagement session - golden hour scout
title: Weekly shoot schedule

body:
Pinnacle Events shoot brief

Coverage plan for the spring fundraiser gala.

  • Key moments: arrivals, keynote, auction
  • Two-body kit, fast primes
  • Delivery: 150 edited within 5 business days
title: Pinnacle Events shoot brief

body:
Rosewood Realty listing brief

Real-estate listing shoot notes.

  • Wide-angle interiors, bracketed exposures
  • Twilight exterior
  • Turnaround: next-day MLS-ready set
title: Rosewood Realty listing brief

body:
Gear checklist

Pre-shoot equipment run-through.

  • Bodies + backup, batteries charged
  • Primes 35/50/85, two speedlights
  • Cards formatted, tripod, reflector
title: Gear checklist

body:
Client onboarding checklist

Steps for new photography clients.

  • Send contract + invoice
  • Confirm date, location, shot list
  • Calendar hold + gallery setup
title: Client onboarding checklist

body:
Lighting setups

Reference diagrams for common sessions.

  • Clamshell for headshots
  • Rembrandt for portraits
  • Window + reflector for natural light
title: Lighting setups

body:
Pricing and packages

Session rates and deliverables for 2026.

  • Portrait session
  • Event coverage (hourly)
  • Real-estate listing flat rate
title: Pricing and packages

body:
Porch Light editing notes

Personal workflow and color grading notes.

  • Lightroom presets to refine
  • Export settings for prints vs web
  • Backup routine to NAS + cloud
title: Porch Light - editing notes
